title: Rich Savory Croatian Egg White Frittata
description: A savory and light Croatian dish featuring egg whites, score fat, and plant-based friendly ingredients, cooked to perfection on a comal.
instructions: Preheat the comal over medium heat to 325 degrees Fahrenheit.
Whisk the egg whites in a bowl until stiff peaks form.
Heat the score fat on the comal and saute the chopped onion until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the diced bell pepper and cook for 2 minutes until tender.
Add the chopped mushrooms and cook for 3 minutes until they release their liquid and start to brown.
Pour the whisked egg whites over the vegetables on the comal.
Cook for 5 minutes until the edges start to set.
Use a spatula to gently lift and fold the edges of the frittata towards the center.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes until the egg whites are almost set.
Remove from heat and sprinkle with chopped fresh parsley.
